title: dupatya nivea
side_effects: Dupatya nivea can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can also lead to headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. Furthermore, improper use of Dupatya nivea can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using the plant to avoid these potential side effects.
